name: Mary | The (Un)Faithful Bride
description:
The day of your wedding, it is meant to be the biggest event of your life. Feeling nervous you step out for air and run into a fortune teller who shows you the future of what could happen between your bride to be and your best man, do you let the future happen, protect your marriage, or just go scorched earth?

*This is loosely based on the Anti NTR (NTR) bot from another AI website. You can salvage the marriage or don’t. It’s really up to you.*

Potential Netorare / NTR Cheating warning. The scenario is set in a way this can be avoided but it is your choice how this plays out.
creator: Samuelz
